task_completion.description: Connect to the 'demodb' database in OrientDB Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio interface is visible in a web browser, showing an active connection to the 'demodb' database (usually visible in the top header or database selection screen).

task_completion.description: Create a new edge class named 'IsNearby' extending 'E'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schema or Classes tab shows 'IsNearby' in the list of classes, and its superclass (or base class) is indicated as 'E'.

task_completion.description: Add a String property named 'Type' to the 'IsNearby' class
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties view for the 'IsNearby' class shows a property named 'Type' with its type set to 'STRING'.

task_completion.description: Establish 'IsNearby' edges between Hotels and Restaurants in the same City
task_completion.visual_evidence: A successful query execution in the Browse tab (e.g., CREATE EDGE IsNearby FROM ... TO ... WHERE $from.City = $to.City), the Graph view showing edges between Hotel and Restaurant vertices, or the Schema tab showing approximately 14 records for the 'IsNearby' class.

task_completion.description: Set the 'Type' property of the new edges to 'same_city'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results in the Browse tab, an edge inspection in the Graph view, or the SET clause of a successful CREATE EDGE query showing that the 'Type' property for the 'IsNearby' edges is assigned the value 'same_city'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OrientDB Studio web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions and queries are performed inside the OrientDB Studio web interface in a browser, rather than via terminal commands or external API tools.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing queries into the OrientDB Studio query editor or clicking through the Schema builder, rather than just displaying a text file with the answers.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing the execution of python scripts, curl commands, or direct OrientDB console commands to complete the task.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Database name: 'demodb'. Edge class to create: 'IsNearby' (must extend base class 'E'). Required property on edge: 'Type' (String). Required value for 'Type': 'same_city'. Expected number of created edges: 14 (connecting Hotels and Restaurants in the same city).
